issue.title: We need to make our error message more useful for user, and remove wrong options/suggestions

relatedIssue.title: Аудио дорожка должна браться от driving_video
relatedIssue.body: В результирующем видео аудио дорожка должна браться от driving_video. При этом учесть, что результирующее видео может быть меньше, чем driving_video.

problemDescription: The error message shows 'Option 3: Work without syncing fork (NOT RECOMMENDED)' which is never actually a valid option, and it doesn't suggest the viable option of deleting the fork manually so it can be recreated.

affectedUsers.scenario: Users who encounter fork divergence when their fork's main branch has different commits than upstream
affectedUsers.trigger: Typically occurs when upstream had a force push (e.g., git reset --hard)
